$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C22 2026-07-18): RUN witness for the 3 Tcl functions added to tcl.json to clear test6 + test_vfs -- Tcl_AttemptRealloc (char *Tcl_AttemptRealloc(char*, unsigned int); grows a buffer) + Tcl_UtfToLower (int Tcl_UtfToLower(char*); in-place lowercase, returns byte len) + Tcl_AppendObjToObj (void Tcl_AppendObjToObj(Tcl_Obj*, Tcl_Obj*)). All exported libtcl8.6 functions; adding them takes test6 + test_vfs CLEAN (34->36; their P9006 blocker was fixed in C21, S0001 on these was the residual). Cmd (libtcl calls it back on the eval) appends obj "0" onto obj "4" -> "40" parsed to 40 (Tcl_AppendObjToObj + Tcl_GetIntFromObj), grows a 4-byte "AB" buffer to 64 (Tcl_AttemptRealloc) then lowercases it to "ab" returning 2 (Tcl_UtfToLower) -> 40 + (2 + (s[0]=='a'?0:100)) = 42, value-divergent over values libtcl round-tripped. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 runs it (libtcl8.6). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove any of the 3 from tcl.json -> S0001 -> stops compiling.
